PHOTO — first light over a Sri Lankan coastline; community at dawn

Resplendent Hope · A Christian Ministry

Hope that reaches
beyond every border.

Sri Lanka means the resplendent island. We carry that light as resplendent hope — to widows, orphans, and the rescued across Sri Lanka, Cambodia, and beyond.

Donate now →Read his story

“He has sent me to bind up the brokenhearted, to proclaim freedom for the captives.”Isaiah 61:1

Our Approach

We hit the ground listening.

We believe God has already appointed leaders in every part of the world. We seek out gifted local church leaders whose work shows the love of God — then partner with them, lending our assets and abilities so that each of us serves in unity.

1

Relationship

We take time to understand each leader’s vision, values, and gifts before anything is built.

2

Partnership

We establish partnerships tailored to local needs — service in unity, not service imposed.

3

Empowerment

We support those needs through lasting empowerment, so the work belongs to the community.

PHOTO — founder Dave Sprowl with Pastor Adrian DeVisser, Sri Lanka

Our Story

“To get his soul back.”

After the tsunami of December 2004, Dave Sprowl traveled to Sri Lanka to do disaster-relief work. There he met Pastor Adrian DeVisser, a Sri Lankan Christian pastor who handed out cards printed with his own cell number: if you need help, call this number.

That was the beginning of a lifelong commitment to empowering victims of poverty, trafficking, and natural disaster — the work we now carry forward as Resplendent Hope.

He told me he was going to Sri Lanka — to get his soul back. More than twenty years later, that first trip had become schooling for thousands of children, freedom for hundreds of women, and dozens of schools, churches, and shelters across two continents.

Our Work

Holistic ministry — for body and soul.

The heart of holistic ministry is meeting the physical needs of food, clothing, and shelter together with sharing the gospel. The grace of giving joins the sharing of the message.

Rescue & Restoration

Freedom for women trapped in sexual slavery — with safe housing, counseling, and the dignity of a fresh start.

Widows & Orphans

Care for those a karma-based culture casts aside — housing, provision, and a community that refuses to look away.

Education & Schools

Classrooms so a child can go to school instead of being sold — thousands educated, and counting.

Sustainable Trades

Skills, tools, and microenterprise so a widow can feed her children with dignity and lasting independence.

Disaster Relief

First responders in flood, war, and famine — the same listening posture that began after the 2004 tsunami.

Local Leadership

Every program runs through trusted local Christian leaders we know by name — help that arrives without waste.

Where We Serve

Four nations. One unity.

Through effective local Christian leaders, we serve those in need across South and Southeast Asia and into Africa.

PHOTO — Sri Lanka

Sri Lanka

Where it began — widows, orphans, and rescue from trafficking.

PHOTO — Cambodia

Cambodia

Shelter, schooling, and protection for vulnerable children.

PHOTO — Southeast Asia

Southeast Asia

Partnering with leaders meeting needs across the region.

PHOTO — Zimbabwe

Zimbabwe

Holistic ministry alongside established local churches.

20+

Years of service

4

Nations served

1000s

Children educated

100s

Women set free

Dozens

Schools, churches & shelters

Stories

Every gift has a face behind it.

PHOTO — widow at her new trade

Her story isn’t over

Widowed and blamed by her community, she was given housing, counseling, and a trade — and discovered her story had only begun.

PHOTO — girl in a classroom

A desk, not a price

A little girl who gets to go to school instead of being sold — learning to read, to dream, and to hope for tomorrow.

PHOTO — mother and children

Fed with dignity

A mother who can now feed her children by her own hands — the quiet, daily miracle of restored dignity.

“Religion that God our Father accepts as pure and faultless is this: to look after orphans and widows in their distress.”

James 1:27

Our vision is service in unity — a partnership between leaders God has appointed in every part of the world, each lending the assets and abilities they possess. We give because compassion is not merely a feeling. It is a choice.

Where Your Gift Goes

Trusted hands, on the ground.

We don’t parachute in. We channel your giving through established local Christian leaders we know personally — people already doing holistic ministry in their own communities. It means help arrives quickly, faithfully, and without waste.

1

Listen

We hit the ground listening to identify gifted leaders and real local needs.

2

Partner

We build a partnership tailored to each community’s vision and assets.

3

Empower

We fund and support the work so it becomes lasting and locally owned.

Open Doors With Us

Whatever you give doesn’t just change a life. It restores a soul.

Give because you believe in redemption that reaches beyond borders. Choose an amount — one-time or monthly — and join the work.

A gift of any size opens a door.

Give today →

Resplendent Hope is a registered 501(c)(3). Your gift is tax-deductible.

Stay close to the work.

Stories from the field, updates from our partners, and ways to pray — a few times a year.

Resplendent Hope

A Christian ministry serving widows, orphans, and the rescued through effective local leaders in Sri Lanka, Cambodia, Southeast Asia, and Zimbabwe.

“Whatever you did for one of the least of these, you did for me.”Matthew 25:40
